title: eulophia hians var. inaequalis
intro: Eulophia hians var. inaequalis, also known as the "Coral Root" or "Snake Orchid", is a plant species belonging to the family Orchidaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and glycosides, which provide various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Eulophia hians var. inaequalis is typically used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
